new.title: Animated Icon Loop
new.subtitle: Native Symbol Replace
new.body: Loop through SF Symbols with native replace transitions.

new.title: Flexible Icon Schema
new.subtitle: icon, toIcon, and icons
new.body: Define icons with icon, toIcon, or a full icons array.

new.title: Default Glass Badge
new.subtitle: Softer Icon Treatment
new.body: A new rounded glass badge gives icons a softer default look.

new.title: Gradient Icon Glyphs
new.subtitle: Theme-Tinted Symbols
new.body: Icon glyphs now use a top-leading to bottom-trailing gradient.

new.title: Refined Row Layout
new.subtitle: Bigger Icons, Rounder Buttons
new.body: Rows feel tighter with larger icons and rounder action buttons.

new.title: Lower Continue Controls
new.subtitle: Closer Bottom Placement
new.body: Continue controls sit closer to the bottom for easier reach.

new.title: Liquid Mesh Motion
new.subtitle: Slow Animated Backgrounds
new.body: Mesh backgrounds can now move with a slow liquid motion.

new.title: Custom Heading Prefix
new.subtitle: Personalized Title Line
new.body: Set a custom heading prefix for the title line above the version.

new.subtitle: Fixes
new.body: Improved platform support across iOS, macOS, tvOS, and visionOS.

new.title: アニメーションアイコンループ
new.subtitle: ネイティブなシンボル置換

new.subtitle: icon、toIcon、icons対応

new.subtitle: より柔らかなアイコン表現

new.subtitle: ゆっくり動く背景

new.subtitle: テキスト色
new.body: ボタンと履歴のテキスト色が背景の明るさに応じて自動的に切り替わります。

new.body: 直接の値を指定する際に .constant ラッパーが不要になりました。

new.title: 유연한 아이콘 스키마
new.subtitle: icon, toIcon, icons 지원
new.body: icon, toIcon 또는 전체 icons 배열로 아이콘을 정의할 수 있습니다.

new.body: 새 둥근 글래스 배지로 기본 아이콘 스타일이 더 부드러워졌습니다.
